title: Differential Geometry, Lie Groups, and Symmetric Spaces
pdfs: Differential Geometry, Lie Groups, and Symmetric Spaces.pdf

units.title: Elementary Differential Geometry
units.focus: Manifolds, tensor fields, mappings, affine connections, parallelism, exponential maps, structural equations, and curvature.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Lie Groups and Lie Algebras
units.focus: Exponential map, Lie subgroups, transformation groups, coset spaces, adjoint group, semisimple groups, and invariant forms.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: Structure of Semisimple Lie Algebras
units.focus: Lie and Engel theorems, Cartan subalgebras, roots, real forms, Cartan decompositions, and classical examples.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Symmetric Spaces
units.focus: Affine locally symmetric spaces, isometry groups, globally symmetric spaces, curvature, compact Lie groups, and Lie triple systems.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: Decomposition of Symmetric Spaces
units.focus: Orthogonal symmetric Lie algebras, duality, sectional curvature, semisimple isometry groups, and rank.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Symmetric Spaces of the Noncompact Type
units.focus: Semisimple group decompositions, maximal compact subgroups, Iwasawa decomposition, nilpotent groups, and global decompositions.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: Symmetric Spaces of the Compact Type
units.focus: Weyl groups, conjugate points, singular sets, compact groups, affine Weyl groups, and rank-one geometry.
units.label: Chapter 7

units.title: Hermitian Symmetric Spaces
units.focus: Almost complex manifolds, Ricci curvature, bounded domains, Hermitian symmetric spaces, and Cartan-Harish-Chandra representation.
units.label: Chapter 8

units.title: Structure of Semisimple Lie Groups
units.focus: Cartan, Iwasawa, Bruhat, rank-one, SU(2,1), Cartan subalgebras, automorphisms, multiplicities, and Jordan decompositions.
units.label: Chapter 9

units.title: Classification of Simple Lie Algebras and Symmetric Spaces
units.focus: Classical groups, root systems, Dynkin diagrams, finite-order automorphisms, real forms, and symmetric-space classification.
units.label: Chapter 10
